name: Red Snapper Grilled in Corn Husks (Gc)
recipeIngredient: 6 American red snapper fillets - 6 ounces each
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal grill and let it burn down to embers.
2. Brush each filet with olive oil and season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. For each fillet, lay one corn husk flat on the work surface, place the fillet inside, and top with second corn husk. Using strips of corn husks, tie at each end in a knot.
4. Brush the snapper package with more olive oil and place seam side down on the grill.
5. Cook for 3 1/2 minutes on each side. Remove from grill.
6. Open the husk with a knife, being careful not to cut the fish, and drizzle with Spicy Orange Vinaigrette.
Yield: 6 servings
